title: SpaceX reportedly working on an AI phone
abstract: SpaceX is reportedly developing an artificial intelligence-powered smartphone, leveraging advanced AI technologies for enhanced user experiences and innovative functionalities.
abstract_zh: 哇，听说SpaceX要搞一款AI手机，这还不算什么，他们还打算把这款手机变成一个超级多才多艺的小帮手，各种高级AI技术加持下，用户体验妥妥的杠杠滴！感觉以后连日常生活的很多琐事都可以靠它来搞定。反正我就是想提前预定一部了！
